visual_description: A close-up shows a person in a blue shirt and grey trousers with pink lace underwear visible while seated on a brown couch. The scene then cuts to a man in a red shirt sitting on the same couch, looking forward, before widening to show another person leaning forward on the couch beside him. Finally, a woman in a white shirt carrying a black bag walks through a doorway into a room with purple walls.
